name: Suite F03 retest — single case verifying tickets-critical-priority new verified entry
description: Verifies the new verified-query entry 'tickets-critical-priority' matches at sim=1.00 verbatim and produces correct rows.

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
